---
title: "day3_reproducibility_notes"
author: "Krish"
format: html
editor: visual
toc: true
---

## R Environment Setup

I am trying to learn somthing

```{r}
#| eval: false
```

## Conda Environment Setup

## Step 1: Searching for FastQC

This will activate the conda FastQC

```{bash}
#| eval: false
```

This is second bash chunk

```{bash}
#| eval: false
```
